docs.title: AI Architect · ML Platform Architect · Principal AI Engineer
docs.text:
I design and build production AI platforms, MLOps systems, AI agent applications and machine learning solutions for industrial and enterprise environments.

View projects Architecture Download résumé

docs.title: Areas of expertise
docs.text:
• :material-robot-industrial:{ .lg .middle } Enterprise AI

    Production AI systems for industrial and engineering workflows.

  • :material-kubernetes:{ .lg .middle } MLOps Platforms

    Kubernetes-based platforms covering the complete ML lifecycle.

  • :material-robot:{ .lg .middle } AI Agents

    Agent architectures, orchestration, tool integration and production deployment.

  • :material-chart-timeline-variant:{ .lg .middle } Reinforcement Learning

    Decision systems, demand simulation and offline policy evaluation.

docs.title: Professional profile
docs.text:
• More than 20 years in software engineering, applied mathematics and AI
  • PhD in Theoretical Physics
  • AI Architect and ML Team Lead
  • Course Director for Machine Learning, MLOps, Reinforcement Learning and Quantitative Finance
  • Experience designing secure enterprise AI platforms
